sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 15:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 15:1
items.html: Through the force of the screen that is impressed in them without carrying the coarseness in it. This above-mentioned impression of the screen is called the “windows of the circles.” (Part Two, Chapter Two, Inner light, Item 70)
